---
title: "Powering the Gap Between Pixels and Actuators"
subtitle: |
    Help Sponsor Physical AI Research \
    Fuel the next generation of robotic and AI development.
description: "Bridging simulation-to-real workflows with Isaac Sim, Omniverse, and RL."
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: "#3d95ce"
title-block-banner-color: "white"
toc: false
# toc-location: left
---

<div id="particles-js" style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: -1;"></div>

<script src="/particles.js"></script>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  function getParticlesConfig() {
    const isDark = document.body.classList.contains('quarto-dark');
    
    return {
      "particles": {
        "number": {
          "value": 80,
          "density": {
            "enable": true,
            "value_area": 800
          }
        },
        "color": {
          "value": isDark ? "#ffffff" : "#3d95ce"
        },
        "shape": {
          "type": "circle",
          "stroke": {
            "width": 0,
            "color": "#000000"
          }
        },
        "opacity": {
          "value": 0.6,
          "random": false,
          "anim": {
            "enable": false,
            "speed": 1,
            "opacity_min": 0.1,
            "sync": false
          }
        },
        "size": {
          "value": 4,
          "random": true,
          "anim": {
            "enable": false,
            "speed": 40,
            "size_min": 0.1,
            "sync": false
          }
        },
        "line_linked": {
          "enable": true,
          "distance": 150,
          "color": isDark ? "#ffffff" : "#3d95ce",
          "opacity": 0.5,
          "width": 1
        },
        "move": {
          "enable": true,
          "speed": 0.6,
          "direction": "top",
          "random": false,
          "straight": false,
          "out_mode": "out",
          "bounce": false,
          "attract": {
            "enable": true,
            "rotateX": 710,
            "rotateY": 1200
          }
        }
      },
      "interactivity": {
        "detect_on": "canvas",
        "events": {
          "onhover": {
            "enable": true,
            "mode": "repulse"
          },
          "onclick": {
            "enable": true,
            "mode": "push"
          },
          "resize": true
        },
        "modes": {
          "grab": {
            "distance": 400,
            "line_linked": {
              "opacity": 1
            }
          },
          "bubble": {
            "distance": 400,
            "size": 40,
            "duration": 2,
            "opacity": 8,
            "speed": 3
          },
          "repulse": {
            "distance": 100,
            "duration": 0.4
          },
          "push": {
            "particles_nb": 4
          }
        }
      },
      "retina_detect": true
    };
  }

  function initParticles() {
    const config = getParticlesConfig();
    particlesJS('particles-js', config);
  }

  // Initial init
  initParticles();

  // Watch for theme changes
  const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
      if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'class') {
        initParticles();
      }
    });
  });

  observer.observe(document.body, {
    attributes: true,
    attributeFilter: ['class']
  });
});
</script>

::: {.particles-content style="background: transparent;"}

## The Mission

Building **Physical AI** isn't just a software challenge --- it’s an infrastructure challenge. My work focuses on creating the simulation pipelines and  models (RL, DL and more) that allow AI to move from the computer screen into the real world. 

Your sponsorship directly impacts the ability to:

- **Rent High-End GPUs** for large-scale Isaac Sim training.
- **Purchase Sensors & Actuators** for "Sim-to-Real" physical validation.
- **Maintain Open-Source Repositories** that lower the barrier for others.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Any Help is appreciated given Increased Cost of Hardware and Cloud Computing
:::

---

## Support via Venmo

If my work has helped you, or if you believe in the future of accessible Physical AI research, consider a direct contribution via Venmo.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
#### 📱 Scan to Donate
*(Placeholder for QR Code image - you can upload your Venmo QR code to `files/images/venmo_qr.png` and it will show up here)*

![Scan to Donate](/files/images/venmo_qr.png){width=200px style="border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px;"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
#### 🚀 Direct Link
Simply click the button below or search for my handle directly on Venmo.

**Venmo Handle:** `@Renan-Barbosa` *(Update if different!)*

<a href="https://venmo.com/u/Renan-Barbosa" class="btn btn-venmo btn-lg" role="button">Donate via Venmo</a>

<p style="margin-top: 20px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #666;">
*Every contribution, no matter the size, makes a massive difference in hardware budget and cloud compute time.*
</p>
:::

:::

---

## Impact Roadmap

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## What Your Funds Enable
- **$10:** One day of cloud GPU training time.
- **$50:** A high-precision sensor (ToF, IMU) for a physical robot prototype.
- **$200:** A full microcontroller suite and motor drivers for a new experiment.
:::

## What's Coming Next?
I'm currently working on a **Sim-to-Real** series focusing on training quadrupedal locomotion entirely in Isaac Sim and deploying to hardware. Your support helps buy the physical components needed for this deployment!

---

::: {.text-center}
### Thank You!
*Your support keeps the **"Bored Engineer"** from actually being bored --- and instead, keeps the robots moving.*

[Back to Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary} [Check the Blog](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

:::
